name: BT Catalog
changelog: Added EG-PRO as a third supplier. New EG-PRO admin page pulls their house-brand catalog straight from Shopify's public products.json feed (no credentials needed), parses style number/name/category/colors/sizes/per-color photos, and auto-prices each style (cost x 2, rounded up to .95). Test-feed + import/refresh + clear controls; EG-PRO is exclusive so nothing dedups against S&S/SanMar.
